series_metadata.series_title: Contract / Grant Agreements and Related Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: ODM contracts, grant agreements, inter-agency agreements, industry standard and miscellaneous agreements and DAS state terms schedules for goods and services. Files include the Request for Agreement, Request for Amendment to Agreement, the actual agreements, Approval and Justification sheet, Request for release and Permit for Controlling Board approval, budget justification, Status Tracking Sheet, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: agreement expires. provided state and federal audits are released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: agreement expires. provided state and federal audits are released and all discrepancies are resolved
